name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: Georgetown's TitleMax Title Loans at 1331 Church Street provides fast title and payday loans.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Loans is located at 1331 Church Street, Suite A in Georgetown, SC. This standalone storefront is easily accessible on Church Street in downtown Georgetown. The location is open Monday and Friday from 10 AM to 7 PM, Tuesday through Thursday from 10 AM to 6 PM, and Saturday from 10 AM to 4 PM. Sunday hours are closed.

At this Georgetown, SC location, TitleMax Title Loans offers both title loans and payday advances. Whether you need a quick title loan backed by your vehicle or a payday advance to cover immediate expenses, this storefront serves the Georgetown area. Call the team at (843) 545-8200 to discuss your options and get fast approval.

If you're a Georgetown resident needing quick cash, TitleMax at Church Street accepts vehicles as collateral for title loans. Bring your vehicle title, government-issued ID, and proof of income to apply. Title loans in Georgetown, SC can be processed quickly, helping you meet urgent financial needs without lengthy approval processes.
address: 1331 Church St Ste A, Georgetown, SC 29440

company_info.headquarters: 1331 Church St Ste A, Georgetown, SC 29440

pros: Same-day cash funding with quick in-store approval process
Vehicle title secures the loan, so most credit types are accepted regardless of credit score
Borrower keeps and continues driving their vehicle during the loan term
Flex Line of Credit option allows withdrawals over time rather than forcing a lump-sum draw
Both secured (title pledge) and unsecured line of credit products available at the same location
Bilingual staff on-site at this Memphis location
Long-established location operating since February 2007 with 481+ Google reviews averaging 5.0
cons: No APR, fee schedule, or typical loan cost disclosed on the website — borrowers cannot comparison-shop before applying
Vehicle repossession is a real consequence of default on title pledge loans
Online unsecured line of credit is restricted to 11 states; not available nationally
Store is closed Sundays, limiting access during weekend emergencies
Title loans are a high-cost product class; TitleMax does not disclose rates that would allow evaluation against alternatives
best_for: Vehicle owners with poor or no credit who need fast cash and have exhausted lower-cost options
Memphis-area residents needing same-day funding without a strong credit profile
Borrowers who prefer a revolving credit line over a single lump-sum loan
Spanish-speaking borrowers in the Memphis area who need bilingual service
diagnosis: TitleMax is best suited for vehicle-owning borrowers with damaged or limited credit who need same-day cash and have no access to credit unions, employer advances, or other sub-36% APR alternatives. The main caveat is significant: title loans carry very high costs and the risk of vehicle loss on default, and TitleMax does not publish its rates upfront, making it impossible to evaluate cost before applying.
services: Car title pledge loans (vehicle as collateral)
Unsecured flexible line of credit (online, 11 states)
Loan repayment management via customer portal
meta_description: TitleMax Title Loans at Church St, Georgetown, SC - fast title loans and payday advances.
